meta.name: Jason Zhang
meta.title: Data Scientist & Analyst
meta.footer: Built with Tailwind CSS, Alpine.js & Lucide Icons. Hosted on GitHub Pages.

experience.description: Developed a real-time churn-prediction engine with a team of 4 that reduced customer attrition by 18%. Conducted breakeven analyses across risk segments, uncovering multimillion-dollar margin opportunities.
Deployed RAG applications for internal documentation, driving a 30% increase in information retrieval efficiency.
Architected RESTful microservice for translation of medical content, enabling processing of 100K+ medical documents daily.
Architected RESTful microservice for translation of medical content, enabling processing of 100K+ medical documents daily.

education.detail: Focus in Cloud Computing & Biotech Industry
Machine Learning Specialization · Summa Cum Laude

methodology.label: Problem Framing
methodology.detail: Translate business questions into measurable hypotheses and success metrics before touching any data.

methodology.label: Data Exploration
methodology.detail: Profile, clean, and understand the data landscape — distributions, missingness, and biases.

methodology.label: Modeling & Experimentation
methodology.detail: Iterate fast with baselines first. Use experiment tracking (MLflow) and rigorous cross-validation.

methodology.label: Productionisation
methodology.detail: Containerise, CI/CD, and deploy behind feature flags. Every model ships with a rollback plan.

methodology.label: Monitoring & Feedback
methodology.detail: Track data drift, model degradation, and business KPIs. Close the loop with automated retraining triggers.
